required_production_secrets: SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY or SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY when Supabase storage is active
backend_contract.activation_rule: A future reviewed release change must deliberately introduce an authorized production traffic mode. The current environment schema correctly refuses production traffic.

database_restore_exercise.scope: managed synthetic/private development boundary, clean PostgreSQL 17/PostGIS restore, migration ledger/integrity/API readiness

firebase_internal_distribution_run.scope: debug application and named internal tester group only

production_activation_gates.gate: Phase 11 11C-11H primary pilot completed and 11J decision is PROCEED
Qualified Zambia legal/privacy/consumer sign-off and applicable DPC registration/transfer evidence
Approved production privacy notice, terms, retention/deletion and account-deletion workflow are live
Production Cloud Run/API/portal environment created with least-privilege identities, numeric secret versions and zero public traffic before go-live approval
Actual production backup is restored into isolation and application/storage authorization integrity is recorded
Release-candidate Android no longer exposes synthetic/preview marketplace surfaces in the production path
Production traffic mode is introduced through a separate reviewed authorization change only after all release gates pass
